title: Vehomy Christmas Dog Squeaky Toy Dog Plush Santa Claus Toy Xmas Puppy Santa Toy with Cotton Rope Pet Dog Chew Toy Tug of War Interactive Dog Toy for Small Medium Large Dogs
features: 【Christmas Dog Toy】The dog plush toy is designed as the image of Christmas Santa Claus, which is traditional essential element on Christmas. It is very in line with the festive atmosphere, and good christmas gift for puppies. Let your puppy enjoy the festival with you.

【Durable Material】The XMAS dog toy is made of rough corduroy fabric that is bite-resistant and helpful for pets' teeth cleaning, stuffed with natural cotton that is safe for puppies. On the both ends of the In the christmas puppy toy, there are durable cotton rope, which can satisfy the dog's strong pulling and tugging.

【Suitable for All Dogs】The the santa claus dog toy is about 17.7" x 3.9" x 3.1", suitable for small medium lareg dogs, which love tug of war, toss and fetch games, such as Poodle, Pomeranian, French bulldog, Corgi, Bichon Frise, Schnauzer, Golden Retriever, etc.

【Dog Squeaky Toy】The christmas plush santa claus toy is built in a squeaker and stuffed with crinkle paper. When it is squeezed or bitten by puppies, it will make sound to stimulate your dogs, so that attract dog's attention, help to relieve your pet's anxiety.

【Multi-Function】The dog xmas toy feature a rough surface, that is helpful for cleaning dogs' teeth while dogs are chewing them. With a handle and elastic band design, the christmas dog toy can be dragged between two dogs, or dog and dog lovers. A good tug-of-war dog toy. It is also a good companion for dogs, will reduce dogs' destructive behaviors.
description: Vehomy Xmas Santa Claus Dog Toy Christmas Dog Squeaky Toy with Crinkle Paper and Squeaker Dog Plush Toy with Cotton Rope for Small Medium Large Dogs Product Features 1. Festival Theme: Santa Claus is essential role on Christmas Day, the Santa Claus dog toy is really good christmas gift for puppies; 2. Dog Squeaker Toy: The Christmas dog plush toys are stuffed with crinkle paper and squeaker. When your puppies bite on the toy, it will make sound to stimulate your puppies to play with it; 3. Fine Workmanship: The expressions on the christmas puppy toys are made with embroidery process, gleaming and very realistic. The stitching is dense and without any threads. Product Specification -Materials: The dog plush toys are mde of corduroy fabric, which is durable and resistant to bite. The rough surface is good for dog's teeth cleaning. -Size: The Santa dog toy is approx 45cm*10cm*8cm/ 17.7" x 3.9" x 3.1" suitable for small medium large dogs. -Application: Good interactive dog toys, you can use the dog toys to train your puppy indoor or outdoor.
